creator: bazzoola@gmail.com
text:
I cannot get this to compile on

FreeBSD sa.bsd 7.0-STABLE FreeBSD 7.0-STABLE #2: Sat Apr  5 01:27:33  
CDT 2008     root@sa.bsd:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

I do have both:
sa# pkg_info | grep asterisk
asterisk-1.4.18.1_1 An Open Source PBX and telephony toolkit
asterisk-gui-0.0.1r20070801_2 An asterisk ajax web manager

and also:
sa# pkg_info | grep dsp
spandsp-devel-0.0.4.p15 A DSP library and software FAX machine

I contacted the author with the problem however, I have not received  
any reply yet.

I did this:
sa# fetch "http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?prp=118368-1-txt&n=/asterisk-agx.sh 
"

sa# sh asterisk-agx.sh
c - /usr/ports/net/asterisk-agx
